prestazioni: Engine swap to 1HD-FTE (4.2L turbocharged inline-6 diesel, 165–200hp stock) with a BorgWarner EFR 7670 turbo (0.83 A/R, 62mm inducer) and custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust featuring a MagnaFlow 17255 muffler for optimized backpressure and sound tuning.

Full fuel system overhaul with a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, 1000cc ID1000 injectors, and a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with custom maps for E85 compatibility and boost control (targeting 28–32 psi on the 1HD-FTE).

Suspension lift using Old Man Emu Nitrocharger Sport shocks (2.5-inch lift) paired with custom-fabricated heavy-duty front upper control arms (Tough Dog TD-001) and rear trailing arms (ARB RD120) to handle 35x12.50R17 BFGoodrich KM3 tires on Method MR701 wheels (17x9, +12mm offset).
estetica: Custom front bumper replacement with a ARB Summit bumper (winch-ready, 12,000lb Warn Zeon 12-S) and integrated Rigid Industries D-Series Pro LED light bar (30-inch, 180W) with a matching rear ARB Deluxe bar (stainless steel, no cutout).

Full interior overhaul with Recaro SRD seats (cloth/Alcantara, 6-point harnesses) mounted on custom brackets, a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (380mm, quick-release), and a full roll cage (Custom Cages Ltd., 4-point bolt-in, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly).

Exterior livery featuring a custom vinyl wrap (3M 1080 Gloss Military Green) with matte black accents (hood, fenders, roof), a JDM-spec Land Cruiser 60 Series front badge (Toyota Racing Development replica), and a custom rear quarter panel vent (fabricated from 1.5mm aluminum, heat-extraction design).
